subcodes.first_line: Have the breezes of holiness wafted over those sanctified spots and meadows, to which the zephyrs of delight and glad tidings once brought their messages [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایا نفحات القدس مری تلک المعاهد و الربی التی مرت علیها نسائم الانس و بشری
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @firmness in the Covenant, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
